subcodes.first_line: O thou offshoot of the divine Lote-Tree! Thy letter dated 20 Muharram AH 1339 [4 October 1920] was received, and its contents caused the utmost joy and felicity on account of the news of the prescribed House
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الافنان النابته من السدره المبارکه نامه مورخ به ۲۰ محرم سنه ۳۳۹ رسید از
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @business; financial; property matters, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
